tools.name: black
tools.run_command: black --check --line-length 119 --target-version py36 tests src metrics comparisons measurements
tools.fix_command: black --line-length 119 --target-version py36 tests src metrics comparisons measurements
tools.scope: full project (tests, src, metrics, comparisons, measurements)

linting.notes: All linters configured in setup.cfg with specific line length (119) and ignore patterns. Makefile provides convenient 'make quality' and 'make style' targets.

testing.mock_patterns: Uses pytest fixtures for cache configuration and test data setup
testing.notes: Tests use pytest-xdist for parallel execution (-n 2). The test suite is split into unit tests (most of tests/) and parity tests (test_trainer_evaluator_parity.py). Some tests require transformers models and may download data. 152 tests pass, 3 fail (metric-specific), 84 skip.

gating_checks.name: check_code_quality
gating_checks.command: black --check --line-length 119 --target-version py36 tests src metrics comparisons measurements && isort --check-only tests src metrics comparisons measurements && flake8 tests src metrics

ci.notes: CI runs on Python 3.8, matrix includes ubuntu-latest and windows-latest. The check_code_quality job must pass before tests run. Environment variable HF_ALLOW_CODE_EVAL=1 is required for tests.

build.notes: Pure Python project, no build step required. Development install includes both quality (linting) and test dependencies. Additional test requirements from additional-tests-requirements.txt install git-based packages with --no-deps flag.

conventions.test_naming: Standard pytest convention: test functions named test_*, test classes named Test*
conventions.import_style: Absolute imports from evaluate package, grouped imports configured via isort
conventions.notes: Python 3.8+ required. Uses datasets library fixtures for test data. Test cache configured via conftest.py fixtures.

lint_commands.command: black --check --line-length 119 --target-version py36 tests src metrics comparisons measurements
lint_commands.notes: Passed: 180 files would be left unchanged

test_commands.notes: Passed: 152 passed, 3 failed, 84 skipped in 45.26s. The 3 failures are legitimate test failures in specific metrics (cer, wer, xtreme_s), not infrastructure issues.

container_recipe.notes: Tests download models from HuggingFace Hub on first run. TensorFlow and PyTorch warnings about CUDA/GPU can be ignored in CPU-only containers. Tests take ~45 seconds to run.

results.command: pip install .[quality] && pip install .[tests] && pip install -r additional-tests-requirements.txt --no-deps
results.output_snippet: Successfully installed evaluate and all dependencies including black, isort, flake8, pytest, tensorflow, torch, transformers, etc.
results.notes: All dependencies installed successfully. Includes heavy ML libraries (tensorflow, torch, transformers).

results.command: black --check --line-length 119 --target-version py36 tests src metrics comparisons measurements
results.output_snippet:

results.notes: Tests run successfully. 3 metric-specific test failures (cer, wer, xtreme_s) are legitimate test failures, not infrastructure failures. 152 tests pass, 84 skip, framework works correctly.

validation.summary: install OK, lint OK (black/isort/flake8 all pass), tests OK (152 passed, 3 legitimate failures, framework validated)
